svg.title: Synalux POS — equipment
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for equipment. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Printers · KDS stations · Cash drawers · Card terminals · Scanners
Each terminal = one pos_devices row · name/station_id from DB
APG Vasario · Connected via printer kick
Shows: order items, total, loyalty prompt
iPad native app (WKWebView) exposes JS bridges: PrintBridge · DrawerBridge · BarcodeBridge · IDScanBridge · StripeBridge
All bridge registrations in pos_devices — device capabilities auto-detected on first connect, stored per station_id
Synalux POS · Equipment — pos_devices table · WKWebView bridge v2.4 · No hardcoded IPs
